collection_method: Manual export using google-play-scraper Python library (version 1.2.7). Reviews were collected in multiple batches across the review date range.
cleaning_steps: Removed stop words using a curated English stop-word list
Dropped reviews with fewer than 3 tokens after cleaning
author: Mihirkumar Patel
note: The Headspace Google Play Store page contains significantly more than 200 reviews. Due to API rate limits and time constraints, 200 reviews were extracted as a representative sample covering the full date range. The sample includes proportional coverage of all star ratings (1-5) and spans a 24-month window.
